notes: The diagnostic_run manifest emits universe_source_url=null for multi-URL universes (loader contract: only single-URL universes carry a single source_url). This sidecar records the three iShares CDN URLs unioned into the sp_1500 variant. Per-URL fetch timestamps are not tracked at the loader level; all three URLs were fetched within seconds of each other in a single run of research.harness.earnings_proximity.universe_variants._load_or_fetch_ishares at 2026-04-25T07:34Z. The snapshot CSV preserves the per-row source_url so each ticker is traceable to its sub-ETF.
